recent_engineering_qa.summary: Battle-UI Issues Sweep (4K-monitor audit). BUG-100..106 filed in docs/testing/DEFECTS_LOG.md + CLR-101 (rules clarification, not a bug). BUG-100/103/104/105 fixed+verified. BUG-101 (terrain off-grid) and BUG-102 (first-render cluster) were each premature-verified 05-16, user re-reported, each had a DIFFERENT true root cause — both re-fixed+MCP-verified 05-17. BUG-106 is a P3 wiring-sweep umbrella (ongoing). CLR-101: objective dead-center confirmed verbatim rules-correct vs Core Rules PDF p.90 — position kept, rule-cite label added.
recent_engineering_qa.bug101_true_cause: ScalableVectorShape2D draws body centered on rotated `offset` not `position`; clamp now back-solves position + adds stroke envelope. Verified 0/316 offenders across 10 distinct seeds.
recent_engineering_qa.bug102_true_cause: BattlefieldGridPanel._update_map_cell_size() mutated cell_size 16/24→48 on resize after placement baked; cell_size now stable=24, never mutated.
recent_engineering_qa.tests: tests/unit/test_battle_objective_tracker.gd 14/14 PASS (shared TacticalBattleUI, no regression); tests/unit/test_post_battle_success_cascade.gd 4/4 PASS (fixed a pre-existing detached-node get_node harness error). 0 compile errors.
recent_engineering_qa.files_modified: src/ui/components/battle/BattlefieldMapView.gd, src/core/battle/BattlefieldGenerator.gd, tests/unit/test_post_battle_success_cascade.gd (+ DEFECTS_LOG.md, QA_STATUS_DASHBOARD.md). Prior sweep days also touched GameState.gd, project.godot, BattlefieldGridPanel.gd, AccordionToolContainer.gd, TacticalBattleUI.gd.
recent_engineering_qa.uncommitted: All battle-UI sweep + prior battle-objective-tracker work is uncommitted on master (~1592 insertions across 35 files). Needs review/commit.
recent_engineering_qa.cross_mode: Changes are mode-agnostic (geometry + additive `rule` key, zero new game values). Battle Simulator (shared TacticalBattleUI scene) exercised; bug-hunt/planetfall cross-mode review still recommended before commit per CLAUDE.md.

current_phase: Phase A.1 — Modiphius Partnership Workback (post Apr 29 meeting + Apr 30 forecast deep-dive + Apr 30 forecast delivery prep). DEAL FRAME LOCKED: 5PFH 4,219 DTRPG / 30K phys, 5L 2,700 DTRPG / 20K phys, 50/50 net split, 5x system as foundation for Modiphius's wider digital strategy. FOUR MUTUALLY AGREED STRATEGIC THESES (T1-T4) captured Apr 30: T1 companion app not digital port, T2 establishing a category not entering one, T3 multi-project platform R&D investment, T4 active digital→physical conversion strategy. See MEETING_FOLLOWUPS_2026-04-29.md §1.5 for canonical statement. Apr 30 forecast deep-dive (MODIPHIUS_DIGITAL_FORECAST.md): Steam-first refocus (0.72 → 0.70 multiplier, mobile = Phase 2 pocket port), §11 industry research (7 subsections, 30+ sourced URLs covering Steam tabletop comps, wishlist conversion, EA risk, pricing psychology, cannibalization, TTRPG market tailwinds), §11.5a five-mechanism digital→physical strategy, §11.1 right-comparison-vector restructure. Phase A.1 deliverables UPDATED Apr 30: forecast doc has +2,500 words industry research, CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md adds §6.1 category-perception probe + §6.5 digital→physical mechanism specs (Phase B alpha deliverables). FORECAST SENT TO MODIPHIUS 2026-04-30: 1-page executive summary PDF (rendered from docs/MODIPHIUS_FORECAST_SUMMARY.md) + current Windows build .exe sent to Chris (CC Gavin) via Gmail. Email body archived at docs/EMAIL_DRAFT_FORECAST_DELIVERY.txt. Full forecast PDF (rendered from docs/MODIPHIUS_DIGITAL_FORECAST.md) staged in reserve for instant send-on-request. Spot-check completed pre-send: Section D contractor frames mapping corrected (Frame A has $100K-$180K break-even range; Frames B+C are pure additional cost, no break-even — earlier draft conflated frames with §9b structures). Reusable renderer at scripts/render_md_to_print_html.py (Pandoc-free, browser Print-to-PDF flow). Awaiting Modiphius reply — log responses in MEETING_FOLLOWUPS_2026-04-29.md §9 tracking table. Next: Phase A.2 (May 5-11) external preliminary planning — first weekly Gavin sync, partnership-on-paper conversation, contractor scope discussion (Frame B retainer is recommended lead), discount-code sizing coordination for T4 mechanisms. Steam EA target late Sep 2026.

roadmap.next_priority: Phase A.2 (May 5-11): first weekly Gavin sync, partnership-on-paper conversation (LOI), contractor scope discussion (Frames A/B/C — lead with Frame B retainer per §9.5), asset delivery begins, telemetry scaffolding code, Van Westendorp Prolific recruitment, T4 discount-code sizing coordination with Modiphius (15-20% placeholder), T4 newsletter API endpoint coordination, Steam wishlist target setting (10K-20K by EA per §11.2). Phase A.3 (May 12-24): cut alpha branch, A0 sanity-check, tester onboarding, T4 mechanism mock-ups in build, category-perception probe questions finalized. Alpha kickoff Mon May 25.
roadmap.modiphius_partnership_status: DEAL FRAME LOCKED 2026-04-29: 50/50 net split after platform fees. Steam-first launch (Apr 30 refocus): Phase 1 EA + 1.0 on Steam exclusively, mobile pocket edition is Phase 2 post-1.0. FOUR MUTUALLY AGREED STRATEGIC THESES (T1-T4) baseline: T1 companion app not digital port, T2 establishing a category not entering one, T3 multi-project platform R&D investment, T4 active digital→physical conversion strategy. Contractor structures on table (Frames A/B/C in MODIPHIUS_DIGITAL_FORECAST.md §9.5 — recommended pitch sequence leads with Frame B retainer, then Frame C hybrid, Frame A intro fee as max ask, pure 50/50 as fallback). Partnership-on-paper progression: LOI in Phase A.2 → MOU during alpha + refinement → Definitive Agreement before Steam EA. 5x system positioned as foundation for Modiphius's wider digital strategy across other licensed IPs (Star Trek Adventures, Achtung Cthulhu, Fallout, Dune).

strategic_theses.T1_companion_not_port: App complements physical book, doesn't replace it. Different evaluation lens than Gloomhaven-style digital replacements. See MODIPHIUS_DIGITAL_FORECAST.md §11.5.
strategic_theses.T2_category_establishment: Solo-RPG/wargame digital companion apps essentially absent on Steam. 5PFH builds the precedent. Empty-Steam-category = both moat AND discovery risk. See forecast §11.1d. Validated via closed alpha category-perception probe (CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md §6.1).
strategic_theses.T3_platform_RnD_investment: Build is foundation for Modiphius's digital strategy across other licensed IPs. Reframes contractor scope from per-product cost to platform investment. See forecast §9.5 multi-project reframe.
strategic_theses.T4_digital_to_physical_strategy: 5 in-app conversion mechanisms drive Steam users to physical book purchases (discount code, Get-the-Physical-Edition CTA, bundled-PDF reminder, expansion pre-order incentives, newsletter capture). Inverts the standard cannibalization concern. Modiphius keeps 100% physical margin. See forecast §11.5a + CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md §6.5 (Phase B alpha deliverables).

phase_B_alpha_deliverables_apr30.category_perception_probe: CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md §6.1 — open-ended language probe + forced-choice category labels + Steam discovery hypothetical. Output: docs/CATEGORY_PERCEPTION_REPORT.md at end of alpha. Feeds Phase C Steam-store-positioning brief.
phase_B_alpha_deliverables_apr30.digital_to_physical_mechanism_specs: CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md §6.5 — design and prototype 5 mechanisms before alpha kickoff so testers can react. Coordination needed with Modiphius: discount sizing, redemption mechanism, co-branded landing page, newsletter API endpoint.
